allow: PowerShell($errors = $null; $tokens = $null; [System.Management.Automation.Language.Parser]::ParseFile\("c:\\work\\cas_cap\\powershell\\cdp_capture.ps1", [ref]$tokens, [ref]$errors\) | Out-Null; if \($errors\) { $errors | ForEach-Object { Write-Host "ERROR: $\($_.Message\) \(line $\($_.Extent.StartLineNumber\)\)" } } else { Write-Host "PowerShell syntax OK" })
